name: billfree-techops
description: BillFree TechSupport Ops — React SPA (Cloudflare Pages) + modular Google Apps Script backend.

scripts.quality: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run lint --workspace apps/web && npm test
scripts.validate:terraform: terraform -chdir=infra/terraform fmt -check -recursive && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform init -backend=false && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform validate
scripts.validate:helm: helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/api-gateway/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/auth-service/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/ticket-service/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/analytics-service/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/calllog-service/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/report-service/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/web/values.yaml && helm lint deploy/charts/microservice -f deploy/apps/monolith/values.yaml
scripts.validate:devops: npm run validate:compose && npm run validate:terraform && npm run validate:helm
